events.title: Writing Complex Information into the Brain
events.description: A seminar hosted by the Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences, exploring how complex information is processed and written into the brain. Part of their research and instructional program.

events.title: CrafterDark – Beaded Potted Plant
events.organizer: Student Union, Cub Concerts at Berkeley
events.description: Unleash your creativity by crafting a beaded potted plant while enjoying live music. It's the perfect study break and a chance to add some green to your space.

events.title: Felt a Friend Workshop
events.description: Hop into spring with a cozy, needle-felted animal friend. Learn to needle felt with wool roving to create a 3D figurine, which can become a keychain.

events.title: Career Counseling 1:1's Drop Ins
events.description: One-on-one career counseling sessions with Daniel Shaw, Associate Director at UC Berkeley Career Engagement. No appointment needed, just drop in.

events.title: Mental Health and the Job Search Panel
events.description: A panel discussion focusing on mental health considerations during the job search process. Offers insights and strategies for graduate students.

events.title: Smart Repayments: Plans, Perks, and Pro Tips
events.description: Learn about various repayment plans, perks, and professional tips for managing student loan repayments effectively.

events.title: Graph Cities and their Applications
events.description: A seminar delving into the concept of 'Graph Cities' and their diverse applications in information science.

events.title: Gesamtkunstvektoren: Perceptual Embeddings for the Performing Arts
events.description: Explores the use of perceptual embeddings, specifically 'Gesamtkunstvektoren,' in analyzing and understanding performing arts.

events.title: The Three Obstructions: Improvements in Analysis & Interface for Multimodal Retrieval
events.description: Discusses challenges in multimodal retrieval and presents improvements in analysis and interface design.

events.title: St. Patrick's Day Celebration
events.location: MLK Jr. Building, 1st Floor Game Zone
events.description: Celebrate St. Patrick's Day at the student union with sweet treats, crafts, and much more.

events.title: Cal Blueprint (Bay Area Open Science Group March Meeting)
events.description: Cal Blueprint, a Berkeley-run nonprofit that builds pro-bono web and mobile apps for nonprofits, hosts its monthly meeting.

events.title: Felt a Friend Workshop
events.description: Another opportunity to create a needle-felted animal friend with wool roving. Your creature can be transformed into a keychain or a figurine.

events.title: Career Chat: An Alumni Panel
events.description: An online career chat featuring an alumni panel, offering insights and advice on various career paths.

events.title: Roundtable with Noah Askin
events.description: A roundtable discussion with Noah Askin, a computational social scientist and sociologist studying the creative process.

events.title: Game Night (Board Games at Berkeley partnership)
events.organizer: Student Union, Board Games at Berkeley
events.description: Join Board Games at Berkeley for an evening of fun trying out new games or bringing your own, with provided snacks.

events.title: The Grad Student Productive
events.description: A student-led space for graduate students to focus on academic work using the Pomodoro technique to maximize productivity.

events.title: Science Communications Workshop
events.description: Learn best practices on science communications and receive 1:1 coaching on your personal pitch from experts. Open to UC Berkeley graduate students, postdocs, and early-career faculty.

events.title: Data Visualization Workshop
events.description: Explore various tools for data visualization and enhance your capabilities in presenting scientific data effectively. Open to UC Berkeley graduate students, postdocs, and early-career faculty.

events.title: Community service orgs on campus!
events.description: An event to explore and connect with various community service organizations on campus.

events.title: Advancing Intelligent Transportation Systems with AI
events.description: Jumbi Edulbehram of NVIDIA will present on advancing intelligent transportation systems using AI. Followed by a cookie hour.

events.title: UC Berkeley Hitchcock Lecture with Jules Gill-Peterson
events.description: A prestigious lecture featuring Jules Gill-Peterson, hosted by the UC Berkeley Graduate Division.

events.title: Drag Bingo
events.description: The final Drag Bingo of the fall semester, offering an unforgettable night of laughter, prizes, and treats.

events.title: Cal Football vs. UCLA
events.description: Cheer on the Golden Bears as they open their 2026 football season against UCLA at home.

events.title: Cal Football vs. Wagner
events.description: The Golden Bears host Wagner in a non-conference football matchup.

events.title: Cal Football vs. Clemson
events.description: Watch the Cal Golden Bears take on Clemson in an exciting ACC conference game.

events.title: Cal Football vs. Virginia Tech
events.description: The Golden Bears face off against the Virginia Tech Hokies in a home game.

events.title: Cal Football vs. Wake Forest
events.description: An ACC conference game as Cal hosts Wake Forest at California Memorial Stadium.

events.title: Cal Football vs. Stanford (Big Game)
events.description: The 129th Big Game, as the Cal Golden Bears take on their rivals, Stanford, at home.

events.title: Cal Football vs. Pittsburgh
events.description: The Golden Bears wrap up their regular football season against Pittsburgh at home.

events.title: Cal Baseball vs #15 North Carolina
events.description: The Cal baseball team takes on #15 North Carolina in a home game.

events.title: Cal Baseball vs #15 North Carolina
events.description: Catch another exciting baseball game as Cal plays #15 North Carolina.

events.title: Cal Baseball vs #15 North Carolina
events.description: The final game in the series between Cal Baseball and #15 North Carolina.

events.title: Women's Gymnastics vs San Jose State
events.description: The Cal Women's Gymnastics team competes against San Jose State.

events.title: Men's Tennis vs Boston College
events.description: The Cal Men's Tennis team hosts Boston College for a match.

events.title: CrafterDark at Anchor House
events.description: A weekly craft session offering free crafting and art making at Anchor House.

events.title: Talk on AI and Democracy with Larry Norden, Ashish Goel, and David Evan Harris
events.description: A virtual discussion on how artificial intelligence is shaping democracy, featuring experts from various fields.

events.title: Talking Industry Research Funding: Partnership Fundamentals
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Office of Intellectual Property and Industry Research Alliances (IPIRA)
events.description: Explore opportunities and mechanisms for working with industry sponsors of research, covering pitching, contracts, and intellectual property.

events.title: Advanced Air Mobility and eVTOL: Navigating Vertical Mobility Innovation and the Public Good
events.organizer: ITS Berkeley, UC Berkeley Civil and Environmental Engineering
events.description: A panel discussion on vertical mobility innovation, co-sponsored by the UC Berkeley Department of Civil and Environmental Engineering.

events.title: Cultivating Collective Care in Teaching and Academic Life
events.description: A session focused on fostering collective care practices within teaching and academic environments.

events.title: Create Accessible Content in bCourses
events.description: A workshop on developing accessible content within the bCourses platform.

events.title: Disability in David Narratives in light of Armed Conflicts in Africa (Huli Ramantswana)
events.description: A lecture by Huli Ramantswana discussing disability within David Narratives, considering the context of armed conflicts in Africa.

events.title: The Loft Hour: Tadiwa Madenga + Juliana Ramírez Herrera
events.description: An event featuring Tadiwa Madenga and Juliana Ramírez Herrera at The Loft Hour.

events.title: Ecosystems of Innovation: Leveraging Machine Learning Tools, Models and AI Agents in Scientific Discovery Workflows
events.description: This event explores how machine learning tools, models, and AI agents can be leveraged within scientific discovery workflows to foster innovation.

events.title: Whatever it Takes: Tackling the Housing Affordability Crisis
events.description: A discussion focused on strategies and efforts to address the pressing housing affordability crisis.

events.title: Paranoid Publics: Psychopolitics of Truth (Zahid Chaudhary)
events.description: Zahid Chaudhary presents on 'Paranoid Publics,' exploring the psychopolitics of truth in contemporary society.

events.title: Sinan Antoon and Huda Fakhreddine | Our Oracle Ruin: Reading from Gaza's Book of Genocide
events.description: Sinan Antoon and Huda Fakhreddine read from 'Gaza's Book of Genocide,' offering critical perspectives.

events.title: Holloway Poetry Series: Wendy Trevino
events.description: Wendy Trevino shares her work as part of the Holloway Poetry Series.

events.title: Film Screening – “Compensation”
events.description: A screening of the film 'Compensation.'

events.title: Where We Gather, We Are Home: A West Coast Indigenous Gathering
events.description: A day-long gathering for West Coast Indigenous communities.

events.title: Animal Commodities and some of the Earliest Vestiges of the Silk Roads
events.description: A lecture exploring the historical significance of animal commodities and their connection to the early Silk Roads.

events.title: Public talk by Professor Courtney Jung from the University of Toronto
events.description: Professor Courtney Jung from the University of Toronto delivers a public talk.

events.title: “Standing Above the Clouds”: A Film Screening & Fireside Conversation
events.description: A film screening followed by a fireside conversation.

events.title: Opera Parallèle: La Belle et la Bête
events.description: An operatic performance of 'La Belle et la Bête' by Opera Parallèle.

events.title: Gallery+Studio Workshop / Leaves, Flowers, and Popsicle Sticks
events.description: A hands-on workshop in the gallery and studio, focusing on crafting with natural and everyday materials.

events.title: ¡Roundtable Reading Bilingüe! / The One and Only Ivan / El único y incomparable Iván by Katherine Applegate
events.description: A bilingual roundtable reading of Katherine Applegate's 'The One and Only Ivan.'

events.title: UC Berkeley Symphony Orchestra
events.description: A performance by the UC Berkeley Symphony Orchestra.

events.title: Sing Out! A Singalong: Songs of Freedom, Justice & Hope
events.description: A singalong event featuring songs centered around themes of freedom, justice, and hope.

events.title: JACK Quartet
events.description: A performance by the renowned JACK Quartet.

events.title: Flowers & Falafel evening
events.location: Inclusive Excellence Hub, 103 conference room + Outdoor Patio
events.description: Craft your own stunning bouquet, enjoy delicious Mediterranean food, and connect with other grad students.

events.title: Graduate Student Patio Party
events.organizer: Student Union, Graduate Social Club, Grad Division
events.description: Bring some friends and enjoy tasty bites at this patio party for graduate students, in partnership with the Graduate Social Club and Grad Division.

events.title: UC Berkeley Grad Slam Competition
events.location: Sutardja Dai Hall, Banatao Auditorium, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Cheer on Berkeley grad students as they showcase their research in a series of three-minute talks. Free admission with refreshments.

events.title: Film screening of Legally Blonde
events.description: An enjoyable evening featuring a screening of the charming, empowering, and witty film 'Legally Blonde.'

events.title: Academy of Distinguished Alumni Banquet 2026
events.description: The annual gala to induct new members into the Class of 2025, commemorating the 14th anniversary of the ADA's founding.
